text:

Log:
  In v3 UNIX, the kill utility is documented in category 8, not 1.
  Add a note of it.
  http://minnie.tuhs.org/cgi-bin/utree.pl?file=V3/man/man8/kill.8

  PR:		211786
  Approved by:	bcr (mentor)
